block_00: Find the promo code, snatch the prize
block_01: A fun surprise for sharp-eyed traders 🎉
block_02: This year, we have shared lots of trading insights and useful tools on the IQ Option Blog. And now it’s time to put this knowledge to practice with our special gift – a Risk-Free Trade Promo Code.
block_03: What is the Risk-Free Trade Promo Code?
block_04: With the Risk-Free Trade Promo Code, you can make a trade without worrying about potential losses up to a certain amount*. It's your chance to explore new strategies, try different assets, or just enjoy trading without the risk.
block_05: To get this gift, you’ll have to use your observation skills – one of the key traits of any successful trader.
block_06: Here’s what you need to do.
block_07: Find the first part of the promo code in the picture below. Hint: look for a word.
block_08: Proceed to the article and find the second part of the promo code in the text. Hint: search for a word that looks different from the rest.
block_09: Make a deposit to your account and enter the promo code at the checkout. Please enter the two parts of the promo code together without spaces between them.
block_10: Congrats! Enjoy your next trade risk-free.
block_11: Got it? Great! Now it’s time to learn about the key assets of 2023 and find the second part of the promo code in this article.
block_13: The number of promo codes is limited, so hurry up to claim your gift!
block_14: *This promo code covers 5 dollars. This means that if your next trade is closed at a loss, we will return the amount of up to 5 dollars or an equivalent amount in your currency to your account.
